package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for dumprequest_or_dumpresponse_in_hot_path: Request-path handlers that dump full HTTP requests or responses with httputil.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule309NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule309NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule309NegativeRecord) (Rule309NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario309Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule309NegativeService, input Rule309NegativeRecord) (Rule309NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule309NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
